text: I am engulfed by an atmosphere of thoughtful anticipation. The quiet conversation between others in the spacious, softly-lit lounge leaves me feeling introspective, as if on the threshold of discovery. As I move towards the vivid, information-rich wall of the R+D space, I am stimulated by the bright colors and bold typography. Here, among the blend of intellect and creativity, I feel both curious and slightly humbled—aware of my smallness amidst the ongoing dance of human inquiry and technological evolution.
